blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 207 ft. Looking ahead, 37 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
